creator: drhowarddrfine@charter.net
text:
Report is below when trying to update vim. In fact, it either unregisters itself or uninstalls something because portmaster states there is no installed port but when I tried to reinstall vim it comes back saying it can't update it.

FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p7
